chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1590 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 24.10.2016. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w ASI Manzoor Hussain of P.S Kazi Ahmed. = Mr. Hatim Sakhi, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Gulzar Ali Soomro, Advocate for petitioner, who is stated to be busy before another bench. Mr. Ashok Kumar D. Lohano, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.1, who is also present in person. Learned Counsel for respondent No.1 informs the Court that already a habeas corpus petition under Section 491 Cr.P.C is pending before the learned IIIrd Additional Sessions Judge, Shaheed Benazirabad, in which the present respondent No.1 has agitated his grievances agaisnt the petitioner, who according to respondent No.1 has illegally detained the wife of the respondent No.1-Hamid Ali, who is daughter of the present petitioner. Be that as it may, the present parties since have invoked the jurisdiction of the learned IIIrd Additional Sessions Judge, therefore, they are directed to seek redressal of their grievances before the competent forum. However, the parties are directed not to cause any harassment to each other by taking law in their hands. Police officials/respondents are further directed to discharge their duties in a fair and just manner. The present petition with the above observation stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
